text:
Republic of West Gorteau (西ゴルトー共和国, Nishi Gorutō Kyōwakoku) is one of the nations of the Mitene Union. It is bordered by the Republic of Hass on the west and the Republic of East Gorteau at the east. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 30, Chapter 318 

Background

After the Chimera Ant crisis was over this country took over part of the Republic of East Gorteau with other parts being taken over by the Republic of Rokario and the Republic of Hass. 

Trivia

West Gorteau is possibly an allegory for South Korea (similar to how East Gorteau is an allegory for North Korea).
